message:
chore(beads): polish perf, tools, Zellij beads (round 2)

- Promote wa-27hy6 (build coordination) P2→P1 — cascade trigger
- Remove false dep wa-2oph2→wa-2ahu0 — SIMD can develop independently
- Add dep wa-3hbv9→wa-2dss0 — TUI dashboard needs caut data
- Add macOS fallbacks to wa-9i3rh, wa-2ahu0, wa-8eoug, wa-27hy6
- Fix wa-1ta8j overlap with wa-2zywl — consumes process_triage as lib
- Add criterion/LabRuntime test requirements to perf beads
- Add swarm learning e2e test to wa-2l9kn (cass)
- Expand wa-2bai5 cross-references to include wa-iehgn and wa-dr6zv
